# Phase 2.4 NPCs and journal entries requirements (2026-02-28 10:00Z)

- [x] Create 2-3 NPC definitions in src/data/npcs.ts (Martha the librarian, Eli the scavenger)

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "'use client';",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "import { useGameStore } from '@/store/gameStore';",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "import { EventBridge } from '@/game/EventBridge';",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "import { speak, cancelSpeech } from '@/utils/speech';",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "import { unlockInteractions } from '@/game/systems/Interaction';",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": " * Dialogue overlay. Renders lines one at a time.",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": " * Advance with Space/Enter; close when dialogue ends.",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": " * role=\"dialog\" aria-modal=\"true\" for accessibility.",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": " * TTS reads each line aloud when shown.",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "export default function DialogueBox() {",
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const currentDialogue = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.session.currentDialogue);",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "  const closeDialogue = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.actions.closeDialogue);",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  const [lineIndex, setLineIndex] = useState(0);",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  const openedAtRef = useRef&lt;number&gt;(0);",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  const lines = currentDialogue ?? [];",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "  const currentLine = lines[lineIndex];",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "  const isOpen = lines.length &gt; 0;",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "  const advance = useCallback(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    const timeSinceOpen = Date.now() - openedAtRef.current;",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Ignore advances within 300ms of opening (prevents accidental instant close)",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (timeSinceOpen &lt; 300) return;",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (lineIndex &lt; lines.length - 1) {",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "      setLineIndex((i) =&gt; i + 1);",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else {",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "      cancelSpeech();",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "      closeDialogue();",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "      unlockInteractions();",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "      setLineIndex(0);",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, [lineIndex, lines.length, closeDialogue]);",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!isOpen) return;",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "    openedAtRef.current = Date.now();",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "    setLineIndex(0);",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, [isOpen]);",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "  // TTS: speak current line when it changes",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!isOpen || !currentLine) return;",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "    const text = currentLine.speaker",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "      ? &#96;${currentLine.speaker}: ${currentLine.text}&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "      : currentLine.text;",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "    speak(text);",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "    return () =&gt; cancelSpeech();",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, [isOpen, lineIndex, currentLine]);",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/data/npcs.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 14,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 59,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export const NPC_CATALOG: NPC[] = [",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  {",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    id: 'martha',",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "    name: 'Martha',",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "    firstMeet: [",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Martha', text: \"Oh! A visitor. I didn't think anyone would find this place.\" },",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Martha', text: \"I was the head librarian here. Before... well. Before everything.\" },",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Martha', text: \"The Alexandria still flies. I see it sometimes, a speck in the sky. They're preserving what we couldn't.\" },",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Martha', text: \"If you're collecting fragments—and you must be—keep looking. The old texts are still here. Buried, scattered, but here.\" },",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    ],",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "    return: [",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Martha', text: \"Back again? I hope you're finding what you need.\" },",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Martha', text: \"The archives had the rarest editions. If any room survived intact, it would be there.\" },",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    ],",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "  },",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "  {",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    id: 'eli',",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "    name: 'Eli',",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "    firstMeet: [",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Eli', text: \"Hey. You with the Alexandria? Saw the beam.\" },",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Eli', text: \"I scavenge. Old books sell—well, traded. People still want stories. Something to read when the power's out.\" },",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Eli', text: \"I've found fragments in the scriptorium. Copyists used to work there. Lots of loose pages.\" },",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Eli', text: \"Rumor is there's a vault under the rotunda. Sealed before the collapse. Could be nothing. Could be gold.\" },",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    ],",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "    return: [",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Eli', text: \"Still hunting? Check the corners. People hid things when they fled.\" },",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Eli', text: \"The courtyard's overgrown, but I've pulled whole volumes from under the vines.\" },",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "    ],",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "  },",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "  {",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "    id: 'cora',",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    name: 'Cora',",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": ",",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "];",
            "lineNumber": 60
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3826325535774231
    },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./PLAN.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 242
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 275
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "  discovered: boolean;",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create an initial book catalog with 3-5 books, each with a few fragments loaded:",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Dante's Inferno (select 3-4 cantos)",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Shakespeare's The Tempest (5 acts)",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "  - One of Chaucer's Canterbury Tales (e.g., The Knight's Tale)",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Edmund Spenser's Faerie Queene (2-3 cantos from Book I)",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "  - A shorter work: perhaps some of Emily Dickinson's poems as individual fragments",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "  - King James Bible (5-8 iconic chapters, e.g. Genesis 1, Psalm 23, Matthew 5-7, 1 Corinthians 13, Revelation 21 — KJV for thematic \"preserving old texts\" flavor; Gutenberg has it). (Strategies for adding the full Bible deferred to a later phase.)",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "  (Pull actual text from Project Gutenberg — these are all public domain)",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create BookPickup.ts entity:",
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "  - A glowing sprite placed on the map in rot.js-generated rooms",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Registers with the Interaction system as type 'book'",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "  - When interacted with: emit 'book-found' event, show book detail, add to store",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Visual feedback: particle effect or glow animation on pickup (deferred; book-pickup sprite used)",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Place 2-4 book fragments per generated map, always inside rooms",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Placement algorithm:",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Pick random rooms from the rot.js room list",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Place fragment at a random open tile within the room",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Ensure no two fragments in the same room",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Ensure at least one fragment is in a room far from spawn",
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.4 — NPCs &amp; Journal Entries",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create 2-3 NPC definitions in &#96;src/data/npcs.ts&#96;:",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Each NPC has a name, appearance (sprite index), and dialogue tree",
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Example NPCs:",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "    - **Martha** — A former librarian, sheltering in the ruins. Gives lore about what happened.",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "text": "    - **Eli** — A scavenger who hints at where rare books might be found.",
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Dialogue is an array of lines, shown one at a time in DialogueBox",
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create NPC entity (placed in ExploreScene, no separate file):",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Static sprite placed in a room",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Registers with Interaction system as type 'npc'",
            "lineNumber": 275
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3098132908344269
    },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export const NPC_CATALOG: NPC[] = [",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "\" },",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "    ],",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "  },",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "  {",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "    id: 'cora',",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    name: 'Cora',",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "    firstMeet: [",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Cora', text: \"You're not one of the scavengers. You have that look—like you actually care about the books.\" },",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Cora', text: \"I was a grad student. Medieval literature. My thesis was on Spenser. Ironic, isn't it?\" },",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Cora', text: \"The reading room had a special collection. Faerie Queene, Canterbury Tales. If the shelves didn't collapse...\" },",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Cora', text: \"Good luck. Someone has to remember.\" },",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "    ],",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "    return: [",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Cora', text: \"Still at it. I admire that.\" },",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "      { speaker: 'Cora', text: \"I heard Martha's still in the archives. She knows where everything used to be.\" },",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "    ],",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "  },",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "];",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "export function getNPCById(id: string): NPC | undefined {",
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  return NPC_CATALOG.find((n) =&gt; n.id === id);",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3021599054336548
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/DialogueBox.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          },

        },
        "signatures": {

        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default function DialogueBox() {",
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "    speak(text);",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "    return () =&gt; cancelSpeech();",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, [isOpen, lineIndex, currentLine]);",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!isOpen) cancelSpeech();",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, [isOpen]);",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!isOpen) return;",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "    const handleKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (e.repeat) return;",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (e.code === 'Space' || e.code === 'Enter') {",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "        e.preventDefault();",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "        advance();",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (e.code === 'Escape') {",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "        e.preventDefault();",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "        cancelSpeech();",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "        closeDialogue();",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "        unlockInteractions();",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "        setLineIndex(0);",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKey);",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "    return () =&gt; window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKey);",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, [isOpen, advance, closeDialogue]);",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!isOpen) return null;",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "  return (",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "    &lt;div",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "      role=\"dialog\"",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "      aria-modal=\"true\"",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "      aria-label=\"Dialogue\"",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "      aria-describedby=\"dialogue-text\"",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "      className=\"dialogue-box\"",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "    &gt;",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "      &lt;div className=\"dialogue-box__inner\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "        &lt;p id=\"dialogue-text\" className=\"dialogue-box__text\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "          {currentLine?.speaker",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "            ? &#96;${currentLine.speaker}: ${currentLine.text}&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "            : (currentLine?.text ?? '')}",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "        &lt;/p&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "        &lt;p className=\"dialogue-box__hint\" aria-hidden=\"true\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "          {lineIndex &lt; lines.length - 1",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "            ? 'Press Space or Enter to continue'",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "            : 'Press Space or Enter to close'}",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "        &lt;/p&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "      &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "    &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "  );",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursor/rules/index.mdc",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 111
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 134
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- **NPCs and books**: NPCs are never placed in the same room as a book fragment. Use &#96;roomsWithBooks&#96; to exclude those rooms from &#96;npcRoomData&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "### BootScene Procedural Textures",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "- Placeholder sprites (player, book-pickup, transporter-pad, npc) are created with &#96;add.graphics()&#96;, drawn, &#96;generateTexture(key, w, h)&#96;, then &#96;destroy()&#96;. Replace with asset loading when tilesets are ready.",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Book/scroll assets**: itch.io has free packs (e.g. \"Book &amp; Scroll Set\" by TrulyMalicious). Use for book-pickup when moving from procedural to asset-based.",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "### Session vs Persisted State",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Persisted** (localStorage): player, library, exploration. **Session-only**: currentDialogue, gamePhase, exploredTiles, etc. exploredTiles resets on new map; addExploredTiles/clearExploredTiles in store actions.",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "### EventBridge Events",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;player-moving&#96;, &#96;player-moved&#96; { x, y }, &#96;interaction-available&#96; { type, label }, &#96;interaction-triggered&#96; { type, id }, &#96;interactive-consumed&#96; { type, id }, &#96;area-entered&#96; { areaName }",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "### Consumable Interactions (books, journals, batteries)",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "- **GameContainer** handles &#96;interaction-triggered&#96; and emits &#96;interactive-consumed&#96; only **after** successfully updating state (openDialogue, collectFragment, etc.).",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "- **ExploreScene** listens to &#96;interactive-consumed&#96; (not &#96;interaction-triggered&#96;) to destroy/remove map objects. Never destroy on &#96;interaction-triggered&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "- This ordering prevents race conditions where the object despawns before dialogue renders.",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "### Keyboard Handlers",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Always check &#96;e.repeat&#96;** — All keydown handlers should &#96;if (e.repeat) return;&#96; early to ignore key repeats. Without this, holding a key briefly causes multiple events that can instantly close single-line dialogues or trigger duplicate interactions.",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "### Phaser Tilemap Gotchas (reduce debug cycles)",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Avoid &#96;forEachTile&#96; / &#96;getTileAt&#96; on layers from separate tilemaps.** Layers created via &#96;make.tilemap({ data })&#96; from different tilemap instances can have incompatible internal structure; Phaser may throw &#96;undefined is not an object (evaluating 'layer.width')&#96; when iterating.",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Prefer fog overlays over per-tile alpha.** Instead of modifying each tile's alpha for fog of war, draw a Graphics overlay with &#96;fillRect&#96; per tile. Uses raw coordinates, no tilemap API.",
            "lineNumber": 134
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.29910266399383545
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/scenes/ExploreScene.ts",
        "range": {

            {
              "startPosition": {

            {
              "startPosition": {

        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "for (let i = 0; i &lt; count &amp;&amp; i &lt; roomsToUse.length &amp;&amp; i &lt; fragments.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Subtle pulse so books are easy to spot",
            "lineNumber": 346
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.tweens.add({",
            "lineNumber": 347
          },
          {
            "text": "        targets: container,",
            "lineNumber": 348
          },
          {
            "text": "        scale: 1.08,",
            "lineNumber": 349
          },
          {
            "text": "        duration: 900,",
            "lineNumber": 350
          },
          {
            "text": "        yoyo: true,",
            "lineNumber": 351
          },
          {
            "text": "        repeat: -1,",
            "lineNumber": 352
          },
          {
            "text": "        ease: 'Sine.easeInOut',",
            "lineNumber": 353
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 354
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.interactionSystem.register({",
            "lineNumber": 355
          },
          {
            "text": "        id: frag.id,",
            "lineNumber": 356
          },
          {
            "text": "        type: 'book',",
            "lineNumber": 357
          },
          {
            "text": "        gridX: tile.x,",
            "lineNumber": 358
          },
          {
            "text": "        gridY: tile.y,",
            "lineNumber": 359
          },
          {
            "text": "        label,",
            "lineNumber": 360
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 361
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 362
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.setBooksOnThisMap(count);",
            "lineNumber": 363
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364
          },
          {
            "text": "    // NPCs: 1–2 per map, in rooms other than spawn, never in same room as a book",
            "lineNumber": 365
          },
          {
            "text": "    const roomsWithBooks = new Set(roomsToUse.map((r) =&gt; r.room));",
            "lineNumber": 366
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcRoomData = roomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 367
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dx = Math.abs(room.centerX - spawnX);",
            "lineNumber": 368
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dy = Math.abs(room.centerY - spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 369
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (dx &lt;= 1 &amp;&amp; dy &lt;= 1) return false; // exclude spawn room",
            "lineNumber": 370
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (roomsWithBooks.has(room)) return false; // exclude rooms with books",
            "lineNumber": 371
          },
          {
            "text": "      return true;",
            "lineNumber": 372
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 373
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcCount = Math.min(1 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2), npcRoomData.length);",
            "lineNumber": 374
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcsToPlace = [...NPC_CATALOG].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5).slice(0, npcCount);",
            "lineNumber": 375
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 376
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; npcCount &amp;&amp; i &lt; npcRoomData.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 377
          },
          {
            "text": "      const { room, tiles } = npcRoomData[i];",
            "lineNumber": 378
          },
          {
            "text": "      const npc = npcsToPlace[i];",
            "lineNumber": 379
          },
          {
            "text": "      const available = tiles.filter(",
            "lineNumber": 380
          },
          {
            "text": "        (t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; ",
            "lineNumber": 381
          },
          {
            "text": "               !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y) &amp;&amp;",
            "lineNumber": 382
          },
          {
            "text": "               !isCorridorTile(t.x, t.y) // Don't block corridors/doorways",
            "lineNumber": 383
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 384
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (available.length === 0 || !npc) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 385
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386
          },
          {
            "text": "      const tile = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 387
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.add(&#96;${tile.x},${tile.y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.npcBlockedTiles.add(&#96;${tile.x},${tile.y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 389
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390
          },
          {
            "text": "      const px = tile.x * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 391
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 430
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 535
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 642,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.29762980341911316
    },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default function GameContainer() {",
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "const handleInfoKey = ",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "const discoveryPercent = ",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": " Math.round((exploredTiles.length / explorableTileCount) * 100)",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "        : 0;",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Build natural spoken summary with pauses (periods create TTS pauses)",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "      const parts: string[] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Flashlight status",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (flashlightBattery &gt; 75) {",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;Flashlight at ${flashlightBattery} percent. Good condition.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (flashlightBattery &gt; 50) {",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;Flashlight at ${flashlightBattery} percent.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (flashlightBattery &gt; 25) {",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;Flashlight at ${flashlightBattery} percent. Getting low.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;Flashlight at ${flashlightBattery} percent. Critically low.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Spare batteries (no \"press B\" hint here - that's said on pickup)",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (spareBatteries === 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push('No spare batteries.');",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (spareBatteries === 1) {",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push('1 spare battery.');",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;${spareBatteries} spare batteries.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Fragments remaining",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (booksRemainingOnThisMap === 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push('No book fragments left in this area.');",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (booksRemainingOnThisMap === 1) {",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push('1 book fragment remaining.');",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;${booksRemainingOnThisMap} book fragments remaining.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Total collection progress",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "      parts.push(&#96;Collection progress: ${fragmentCount} of ${TOTAL_FRAGMENTS} total.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Discovery progress",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "      parts.push(&#96;Area explored: ${discoveryPercent} percent.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Join with \" ... \" for extra pauses between sections",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "      useGameStore.getState().actions.openDialogue([{ text: parts.join(' ... ') }]);",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleInfoKey);",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "    return () =&gt; window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleInfoKey);",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, []);",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onInteractionTriggered = ({",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "      type,",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "      id,",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "    }: {",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "      type: string;",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "      id?: string;",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "    })",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export class InteractionSystem {",
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "detach(): void {",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.scene = null;",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.player = null;",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.interactives = [];",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.currentInteractive = null;",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.boundKeyHandler = null;",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "  /** Call every frame; only shows prompt when standing on the interactive tile */",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "  update(): void {",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!this.player) return;",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (this.isPlayerMoving) {",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (this.currentInteractive) {",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "        this.currentInteractive = null;",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "        EventBridge.emit('interaction-available', { type: '', label: undefined });",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "      return;",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "    const pos = this.player.getGridPosition();",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "    const found = this.interactives.find((i) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "      const range = i.interactionRange ?? 'on';",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (range === 'on') {",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "        return i.gridX === pos.x &amp;&amp; i.gridY === pos.y;",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "      // adjacent: manhattan distance 1 (standing next to NPC)",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dx = Math.abs(pos.x - i.gridX);",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dy = Math.abs(pos.y - i.gridY);",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "      return (dx === 1 &amp;&amp; dy === 0) || (dx === 0 &amp;&amp; dy === 1);",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (found &amp;&amp; found.id !== this.currentInteractive?.id) {",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.currentInteractive = found;",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "      EventBridge.emit('interaction-available', {",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "        type: found.type,",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "        label: found.label,",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else if (!found &amp;&amp; this.currentInteractive) {",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.currentInteractive = null;",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "      EventBridge.emit('interaction-available', { type: '', label: undefined });",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else if (found) {",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.currentInteractive = found;",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2846800684928894

          {
            "text": "interface GameState {",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1.3 — Basic Tilemap Rendering",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Source a free 32x32 post-apocalyptic/ruins tileset from itch.io (procedural placeholder used)",

            "text": "      (Suggestion: search for \"post apocalyptic tileset 32x32\" or \"ruins tileset 32x32\")",

          {
            "text": "      Need at minimum: ground tiles, wall/rubble tiles, grass/overgrowth tiles,",

          },

            "lineNumber": 134
          },

            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Wall/collision layer (rubble, walls, impassable terrain)",
            "lineNumber": 136
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/EventBridge.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 26,
            "column": 3
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "import { EventEmitter } from 'events';",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": " * Typed event names for Phaser ↔ React communication.",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": " * Add new events here as the game grows.",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "export type EventBridgeEvents = {",
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  'player-moving': void;",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "  'player-moved': { x: number; y: number };",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "  'interaction-available': { type: string; label?: string };",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "  'interaction-triggered': { type: string; id?: string };",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "  /** Emitted by GameContainer after successfully handling an interaction. ExploreScene uses this to destroy/remove. */",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "  'interactive-consumed': { type: string; id?: string };",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "  'book-found': { fragmentId: string; bookId: string };",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "  'battery-found': { batteryId: string };",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "  'battery-used': void;",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "  'npc-dialogue': { npcId: string; lines: string[] };",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  'area-entered': { areaName: string };",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  'close-dialogue': void;",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  'open-inventory': void;",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": " * Singleton EventBridge for Phaser ↔ React communication.",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": " * Phaser scenes emit events; React components subscribe and render UI.",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": " * Never import React components into Phaser or vice versa.",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 27
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.27551865577697754
    },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./PLAN.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 272
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 308
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create NPC entity (placed in ExploreScene, no separate file):",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Static sprite placed in a room",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Registers with Interaction system as type 'npc'",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Shows dialogue via the React DialogueBox on interaction",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Tracks whether this NPC has been spoken to (for first-meet vs return dialogue)",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create 3-4 journal entries in &#96;src/data/journalEntries.ts&#96;:",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Found on the ground like books, but shorter flavor text",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Example: a water-damaged diary page from before the cataclysm",
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Provides worldbuilding and hints",
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Registers as type 'journal' with Interaction system",
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Shown in a simpler overlay (or reuse DialogueBox)",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.5 — Low-Stakes Exploration Mechanics",
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] **Flashlight battery**:",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Starts at 100, decreases by 1 per 5 moves",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "  - As battery decreases, FOV radius shrinks (8 → 7 → 6 → 4 → 3)",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "  - At 0, FOV radius is 3 (dim but never blind)",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Batteries can be found as pickups on the map (restore 50), same visual treatment as books",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "  - HUD shows battery level",
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Creates gentle tension without punishment",
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] **Environmental obstacles**:",
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Some corridors have \"rubble\" tiles that are impassable — player must find alternate route",
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Some floors have \"flooded\" tiles that are passable but slow (movement tween = 300ms)",
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Rubble: dark gray tile; flooded: blue-gray overlay; both visually distinct",
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] **Discovery score**:",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Track percentage of map explored (FOV/flashlight touching tiles, not step-based)",
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Show in HUD as \"🗺 X% explored\"",
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Denominator = reachable tiles from spawn; numerator = tiles ever in FOV",
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.6 — Transporter / Beam Mechanic",
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "text": "- [ ] Place a \"transporter pad\" entity at the map spawn point:",
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Distinctive sprite (glowing pad, Starfleet-inspired)",
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Always visible on the minimap (future) and rememberable",
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Registers as type 'transporter' with Interaction system",
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "text": "- [ ] On interaction with the transporter pad:",
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "text": "  - If player has found at least one new fragment: prompt \"Beam up to Alexandria?\"",
            "lineNumber": 308
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2729378938674927
    },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "for (let i = 0; i &lt; npcCount &amp;&amp; i &lt; npcRoomData.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 377
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.npcBlockedTiles.add(&#96;${tile.x},${tile.y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 389
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390
          },
          {
            "text": "      const px = tile.x * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 391
          },
          {
            "text": "      const py = tile.y * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 392
          },
          {
            "text": "      const npcContainer = this.add.container(px, py);",
            "lineNumber": 393
          },
          {
            "text": "      npcContainer.setDepth(5);",
            "lineNumber": 394
          },
          {
            "text": "      const nTorchGlow = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 395
          },
          {
            "text": "      nTorchGlow.fillStyle(0xff9944, 0.25);",
            "lineNumber": 396
          },
          {
            "text": "      nTorchGlow.fillCircle(0, 0, 28);",
            "lineNumber": 397
          },
          {
            "text": "      nTorchGlow.fillStyle(0xffcc66, 0.15);",
            "lineNumber": 398
          },
          {
            "text": "      nTorchGlow.fillCircle(0, 0, 20);",
            "lineNumber": 399
          },
          {
            "text": "      npcContainer.add(nTorchGlow);",
            "lineNumber": 400
          },
          {
            "text": "      const nShadow = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 401
          },
          {
            "text": "      nShadow.fillStyle(0x1a1a2e, 0.6);",
            "lineNumber": 402
          },
          {
            "text": "      nShadow.fillCircle(0, 2, 14);",
            "lineNumber": 403
          },
          {
            "text": "      npcContainer.add(nShadow);",
            "lineNumber": 404
          },
          {
            "text": "      const nOutline = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 405
          },
          {
            "text": "      nOutline.lineStyle(5, 0x1a1a2e, 1);",
            "lineNumber": 406
          },
          {
            "text": "      nOutline.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 407
          },
          {
            "text": "      npcContainer.add(nOutline);",
            "lineNumber": 408
          },
          {
            "text": "      const nRing = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 409
          },
          {
            "text": "      nRing.lineStyle(3, 0xe8a838, 1); // Warm amber — survivor/friendly",
            "lineNumber": 410
          },
          {
            "text": "      nRing.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 411
          },
          {
            "text": "      npcContainer.add(nRing);",
            "lineNumber": 412

          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": " * Proximity-based interaction detection.",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": " * 'on' interactives (books, journals, transporter): prompt when standing ON the tile.",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": " * 'adjacent' interactives (NPCs): prompt when standing next to the tile (solid, block movement).",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": " * Emits interaction-available and interaction-triggered via EventBridge.",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "export class InteractionSystem {",
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "isSignature": true
          },

            "lineNumber": 20
          },

            "lineNumber": 21
          },

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 24
          },

            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "  private onPlayerMoving = () =&gt; { this.isPlayerMoving = true; };",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "  private onPlayerMoved = () =&gt; { this.isPlayerMoving = false; };",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "  /** Register an interactive object (called when entities spawn) */",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "  register(interactive: Interactive): void {",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!this.interactives.some((i) =&gt; i.id === interactive.id)) {",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {

          },

            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },

          },
          {
            "text": "  unregister(id: string): void {",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 38
          },

          },

          {
            "text": "'use client';",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "import { useGameStore } from '@/store/gameStore';",

          },
          {
            "text": "import { BOOK_CATALOG } from '@/data/books';",

          },
          {
            "text": "import { speak, cancelSpeech } from '@/utils/speech';",

          {
            "text": "import { unlockInteractions } from '@/game/systems/Interaction';",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": " * Reading a found book fragment. WCAG contrast for text.",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": " * Close with Space/Enter. TTS reads the fragment aloud.",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "export default function BookDetail() {",
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const currentBookFragment = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.session.currentBookFragment);",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "  const closeBook = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.actions.closeBook);",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "  const gamePhase = useGameStore((s) =&gt; s.session.gamePhase);",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  const isOpen = gamePhase === 'reading' &amp;&amp; currentBookFragment !== null;",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  const openedAtRef = useRef&lt;number&gt;(0);",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Track when the book opens",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!isOpen) return;",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    openedAtRef.current = Date.now();",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, [isOpen]);",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "  // TTS: speak fragment text when opened",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!isOpen || !currentBookFragment) return;",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    const intro = &#96;Reading ${currentBookFragment.label}.&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "    speak(intro + ' ' + currentBookFragment.text);",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    return () =&gt; cancelSpeech();",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, [isOpen, currentBookFragment?.id]);",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!isOpen) cancelSpeech();",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, [isOpen]);",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!isOpen) return;",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "    const handleKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (e.repeat) return; // Ignore key repeats",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Ignore closes within 300ms of opening (prevents accidental instant close)",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (Date.now() - openedAtRef.current &lt; 300) return;",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (e.code === 'Space' || e.code === 'Enter' || e.code === 'Escape') {",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "        e.preventDefault();",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "        cancelSpeech();",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKey);",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "    return () =&gt; window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKey);",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, [isOpen, closeBook]);",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!isOpen || !currentBookFragment) return null;",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "  const book = BOOK_CATALOG.find((b) =&gt; b.id === currentBookFragment.bookId);",
